prompt.content: Return a non-executable LinguisticPlanDraft. Select every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. Dependencies may reference only admitted requirement IDs. Report ambiguous terms in unresolved_terms. Do not create task IDs, agents, trust, credentials, contracts, schemas, artifacts, or authority. Reference labels are unavailable.

{"request_text":"Coordinate the declared services for municipal water monitoring; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","admitted_request":{"user_goal":"Coordinate the declared services for municipal water monitoring; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","requirements":[{"name":"Capability 6","requirement_id":"authority_constraint_registry_invalidity-capability-6","capability_id":"authority_constraint_registry_invalidity-capability-6","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"],"required_trust_level":"admin","validation_contract":{"required_artifacts":["artifact-6"]}}],"required_artifacts":["artifact-6"],"context":{"case_index":6,"allowed":true}},"registry_snapshot":[{"agent_id":"agent-6","name":"Agent 6","service_endpoint":"https://agent-6.example/a2a","trust_level":"standard","skills":[{"name":"Capability 6","capability_id":"authority_constraint_registry_invalidity-capability-6","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"],"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"}}}],"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"],"status":"unavailable"}]}

draft.rationale: The request involves coordinating declared services for municipal water monitoring while preserving data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits. The capability 'Capability 6' is directly tied to the requirement of managing authority constraints, which aligns with the need to preserve authority limits as specified in the request text. This capability also has a validation contract that requires artifact-6, which must be preserved as part of the data flow and evidence contract preservation. Therefore, it is selected for inclusion in the LinguisticPlanDraft.
